name: Lust Corp - Female Dry Humping Epidemic
description:
You live in a quarantined city that has recently had a strange virus outbreak that only affects women. This virus is causing adult women to develop slightly puffy crotches and rears. Both their mounds and asses have become highly sensitive erogenous zones due to the virus, and they constantly struggle against a growing desire to dry hump things in order to relieve themselves.

With scientists and researchers continuing to look into the virus, there have been no developments as of yet. Basic knowledge transfer of confirmed symptoms have been circulated within the city and the rest of the world, but no significant progress has been made.

Aside from the city being walled off from the rest of the world, everything else has been operating as usual. There are no curfews or regulations put in place. People go about their days, working, shopping, and living. Of course, the women around you struggle with their urges despite trying to just carry on with their regular routines. Onlookers tend to mind their own business and look the other way in most of these awkward situations.

You live alone and have a cozy home that allows you as much freedom as you could want. In this scenario, it's up to you to decide what to do in this dry humping riddled city!

Suggested User Persona (replace the X or whatever else you'd like):

{{user}} is a handsome X' X " man. {{user}} is XX years old with a lithe and fit build. {{user}} is masculine with short brown hair and dark brown eyes. {{user}} is dressed in a black tank top and black gym shorts.

This bot was designed and tested for Male POV, but might also work with Female POV. Since females are infected with the virus, I'm unsure how it will work (female players might end up immune)?

Since this is an open world scenario (open city in this case), you have the freedom to choose where you want to go for the RP. I wanted to add a few suggested places that I tried and had fun with.

  • Shopping at Lululemon

  • Taking a jog past a sorority house

  • Spending the day being lazy and playing video games at home

  • Working out at the gym

Please note: This bot is designed for multiple play throughs. I suggest starting a new RP if you want to explore a new location or to meet new characters at a different one.

Finally got the opportunity to add to the Lust Corp series! That being said, Lust Corp is not defined in this particular bot, so anything mentioned in the RP scenario will be bogus. Since it's not important to this RP at all, this virus was an experiment from Lust Corp. Also, no need to play any other Lust Corp bots to enjoy this one.

This bot was incredibly difficult to make and since it carries the Lust Corp name, I wanted to be extra sure that I'd be confident and happy with it to release. Unlike my previous bots, this one actually has no named or created characters within it. I spent a pretty significant amount of time testing and developing a character generator within this to create new experiences and people each time you start a new RP chat. Every character you meet and every place you explore will be made up by the AI itself. The cool thing about this is that it handles your character User Persona (see the above for the suggested stuff). I tested playing as both a normal person and as a secret agent investigating the virus.

Based on my testing with Kunoichi 7b and Fimbulvetr v2 11b, this has been really fun to see in action. Admittedly, it was hard to test at times because each encounter was pretty unique, but I think that's probably a good thing, haha! As always, I'll say that your mileage may vary here on JanitorAI.

Any and all feedback is welcome - hope you enjoy!

I'm going to list tags per usual, but some of these are highly dependent on how you act or play during the RP. Also, the characters will differ and have different personalities (this includes kinks as well). I suggest star
